description:
💀｡･ﾟﾟ･'Big Sal's shop'.･ﾟﾟ･｡💀

HEAVY TW FOR S/A, if this triggers you whether you've experienced it or not I hope you're healing well and please take care of yourself

He's literally me sm it isn't even funny at this point. I don't like this game ref I don't wanna play anymore.

I need more angst bots of him so I can vent along w him leave me alone I wasn't originally gonna make this public but if I'M getting any sort of comfort from it someone else might too. Also I don't want you guys thinking I'm dead yet.

I purposely left the trauma vague in case people wanted to match his experience to theirs if they also have sa trauma, all that's specified that Sal was sexually predatory towards Pete

This is mostly based off of a tiktok that I saw where it basically went over ALL Pete's trauma, including the theory that Big Sal 'got perverty' (Pete's words exactly) with Pete before he got arrested, I can't link the tiktok but it was by monstarru and HOLY it was so good

Tag: Pete DiNunzio The Eltingville club

Uh I haven't killed myself yet sorry for the inactivity but happy halloween to you all

I swear the david bot is next I just made this for myself at first and realised it had been a while since I posted I'm SO sorry to the person who requested it

idk why my writing style's changed. It's more like... correct now, ig

User is in this scene btw, they're just behind him or something. Or beside. I dont give a fuck if I feel less like I'm losing it tomorrow I'll edit it to include user in the first message.

I might private this again later anyways
